title: teucrium afrum subsp. rubriflorum
intro: Teucrium afrum subsp. rubriflorum, also known as red-flowered African germander, is a plant species belonging to the genus Teucrium, characterized by its red flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Teucrium afrum subsp. rubriflorum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
